action: ACTIVATE program_BREAK_CRC_001 + program_IO_CORE + program_CEACAM5
rationale: MSS/pMMR CRC is the primary indication for BreAK CRC-001 and the IO Core corpus. CEACAM5 is expressed in 98.7% of CRC.

action: ACTIVATE program_CEACAM5; REQUIRE Gate 1 (IHC ≥80%) + Gate 2 (IO permissiveness)
rationale: CEACAM5 IHC ≥80% is the validated selection threshold. IHC 50–79% is HARMFUL (PFS HR=1.38).

action: ACTIVATE program_ATR_DDR; REQUIRE RS score + PTEN status
rationale: ATR/WEE1/PARP inhibitors require DDR biomarker selection. RS-High ORR 40% vs RS-Low 5% (berzosertib).

action: FLAG GAP-01; REQUIRE liver metastasis stratification; CITE CO.26 Pint=0.02
rationale: Liver metastasis is the single most important IO stratification variable in MSS CRC. CO.26 liver-met PFS HR=1.39 (HARMFUL) vs no-LM HR=0.54.

action: CITE CO.26 pTMB ≥28 OS HR=0.34; WARN tissue TMB is NOT a substitute (r=0.13, p=0.20)
rationale: pTMB ≥28 is the strongest IO enrichment signal in MSS CRC from randomized data. Tissue TMB has poor correlation with pTMB in CRC.

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'checkpoint' OR 'PD-1' OR 'PD-L1' AND indication contains 'MSS'
action: ACTIVATE program_IO_CORE; CITE three conditions for IO benefit; WARN pharmacodynamic dissociation risk
rationale: IO in MSS CRC requires all three conditions: NLM + pTMB ≥28 + inflamed TME. Unselected MSS CRC has <5% ORR to checkpoint inhibitors.

action: CITE IMblaze370 failure (OS null); WARN cobimetinib suppresses T cell proliferation
rationale: MEK inhibition in MSS CRC failed in Phase III (IMblaze370). Cobimetinib is antagonistic to IO.
evidence: IMblaze370; IO failure archetype: MEK inhibition failure

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'BRCA' OR 'PARP' AND failure_mode contains 'post-PARPi'
action: ACTIVATE program_ATR_DDR CAPRI; CITE BRCA reversion + ABCB1 + RAD51 restoration resistance mechanisms
rationale: Post-PARPi resistance has three mechanisms: BRCA reversion, ABCB1 upregulation, RAD51 restoration. CAPRI ORR 4% post-PARPi vs 36% naive.

action: ACTIVATE CAP_07_EscapeMap; CITE HR=1.4803 (continuous Cox); WARN arm interaction p=0.246 (PROGNOSTIC NOT ARM-SPECIFIC)
rationale: ZEB1 is a validated prognostic marker in the bevacizumab arm of ovarian cancer. Arm interaction is not significant.

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'ZEB1' AND indication contains 'GBM' OR 'glioblastoma'
action: BLOCK — GBM ZEB1 is PERMANENTLY CLOSED; DO NOT ACTIVATE EscapeMap for GBM
rationale: Three datasets all null or contradicted. ZEB1 DECREASES in recurrent GBM — opposite of escape hypothesis.

action: ACTIVATE program_BREAK_CRC_001; CITE QUILT-2.004 design precedent (HR 1.061); REQUIRE three conditions for IO benefit
rationale: Whole-cell vaccine mechanisms in MSS CRC require IO permissiveness. QUILT-2.004 failed in unselected MSS CRC.

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'bevacizumab' OR 'VEGF' AND indication contains 'CRC'
action: CITE TRIBE2 canonical benchmark (mPFS 9.8 mo, ORR 50%, mOS 22.5 mo); WARN BECOME inflates mOS (liver-limited selection)
rationale: TRIBE2 is the canonical comparator for mFOLFOX6 + bev in 1L mCRC. BECOME is liver-limited and inflates mOS.

action: ACTIVATE program_ATR_DDR Adavosertib; WARN PTEN-loss PFS HR=1.82 (HARMFUL); REQUIRE PTEN status
rationale: PTEN-loss creates CDK2 dependency that PROTECTS against WEE1i. PTEN-intact ORR 23% vs PTEN-loss ORR 0%.

action: ACTIVATE CAP_06_BRIEF; CITE BRIEF-1 (CRISPR_VALIDATED, deal_ready=true); DISCLOSE BRIEF-2 (COMPUTATIONAL_HYPOTHESIS)
rationale: BRIEF-1 and BRIEF-4 are CRISPR-validated SL assets. BRIEF-2 is a computational hypothesis — mandatory disclosure.

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'Immunoscore' OR 'CD8' AND indication contains 'CRC'
action: CITE AtezoTRIBE Immunoscore-IC high HR ~0.50 (exploratory); ACTIVATE MOD-05
rationale: Immunoscore-IC is the best validated TME profiling tool in CRC. High Immunoscore-IC correlates with IO benefit.

action: ACTIVATE program_IO_CORE REGONIVO; CITE US ORR 7% (5/70); CITE Japan ORR 33% (all 8 responders NLM)
rationale: REGONIVO US failed in unselected MSS CRC. Japan success was entirely in NLM patients — confirms liver metastasis as the key stratification variable.

action: ACTIVATE program_ATR_DDR Berzosertib; CITE RS score algorithm (CCNE1 amp + CDK2 + RRM2 + CDC45 + CLASPIN)
rationale: RS-High patients have CCNE1 amplification and CDK2 overactivity — they are dependent on ATR for replication stress management.

action: ACTIVATE program_ATR_DDR LATIFY; CITE responder 0.8936 vs non-responder 0.6295; DO NOT CITE delta (QUARANTINED)
rationale: LATIFY uses STK11/KEAP1 gate for patient selection. Delta values are QUARANTINED — only cite responder/non-responder scores.

action: ACTIVATE MOD-15 (Stromal Barrier); CITE immune exclusion domain; WARN pharmacodynamic dissociation risk
rationale: TGF-β and CAFs create the stromal barrier that excludes T cells from the tumor center. This is the dominant failure mode in immune-excluded MSS CRC.

action: CITE GVAX ORR 0% (0/22 despite confirmed T-cell responses); WARN pharmacodynamic dissociation
rationale: GVAX confirmed T-cell priming but zero tumor responses — the canonical pharmacodynamic dissociation example in MSS CRC.

trigger: mechanism_keywords contains 'neoantigen' OR 'tumor mutational burden' AND indication contains 'MSS'
action: REQUIRE pTMB (GuardantOMNI) — tissue TMB is NOT a substitute; CITE r=0.13, p=0.20
rationale: Tissue TMB has poor correlation with pTMB in CRC. pTMB ≥28 is the validated threshold.

action: WARN IHC 50–79% is HARMFUL (PFS HR=1.38); REQUIRE IHC ≥80% for Gate 1
rationale: CARMEN-LC03 showed IHC 50–79% is numerically harmful. Only IHC ≥80% showed directional OS benefit.

action: BLOCK — BRIEF-2 (PTEN-null→ITGAV) is COMPUTATIONAL HYPOTHESIS; DISCLOSE DepMap NULL; DO NOT RECOMMEND as SL therapy
rationale: BRIEF-2 DepMap NULL across all 3 proxies. Not CRISPR-validated. Mandatory disclosure.

action: CITE responder 0.8936 vs non-responder 0.6295; DO NOT CITE delta (QUARANTINED); CITE STK11/KEAP1 gate
rationale: LATIFY delta values are QUARANTINED — version conflict between patent (+0.366) and receipt (+0.2641) unresolved.

action: FLAG SC-001 ACTIVE CONFLICT — CT26 carries BRAF V600E; BreAK CRC-001 requires BRAF WT; REQUIRE resolution before enrollment
rationale: SC-001 is an active scientific conflict that must be resolved before BreAK CRC-001 enrollment.
evidence: SC-001 conflict registry; BreAK CRC-001 Exclusion Criterion #7
